data.body: 46f0 CLAIMED (plan PASSED round 2, after fixing: known_subcommands is help-file-derived -> create help/audit.txt; completion field needs CompletionRecord {attestation,sidecar} shape + completion_sidecar.py in scope). RED: rebar.audit module absent, all_review_results absent. Held out: bare-ticket + enumerator edge tests. Launching held-out impl subagent (all_review_results readers, rebar/audit/read.py aggregator, CLI intercept + help/audit.txt + _audit_commands.py, MCP audit_trail tool).
